title: Leading a Student Club [Part 1]: What Makes or Breaks a Team
description: This article summarizes all the things I've learnt about accountability, trust and culture in student clubs and things that worked for me (and my juniors) during my time as a technical club head
metaDescription: Leading a Student Club Series: Part 1 - What Makes or Breaks a Team. Anecdotes from leading a student club at IIT Madras, focusing on accountability and trust.

title: Full-Duplex RF Transceivers: Can We Transmit & Receive on a Single Antenna?
description: A walkthrough of the current full-duplex research landscape and an overview of the RF IC research directions being pursued at IIT Madras.
metaDescription: Full-Duplex RF Transceivers: Can We Transmit and Receive on a Single Antenna? An intuitive overview of full-duplex RF transceivers, same-channel full-duplex (SCFD), and ongoing research at IIT Madras on enabling simultaneous transmission and reception on a single antenna
